page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: ldsc is a tool for estimating heritability and genetic correlation from GWAS summary statistics. It also computes LD Scores.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: ldsc is a command line tool for estimating heritability and genetic correlation from GWAS summary statistics. ldsc also computes LD Scores.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ldsc is a command line tool for estimating heritability and genetic correlation from GWAS summary statistics. ldsc also computes LD Scores.
